features.name: Fix filter case sensitivity
features.description: Make the filter engine case-insensitive. Lowercase both query terms and tag/playlist names during comparison in backend/app/services/filter_engine.py

features.name: Toast notifications on all actions
features.description: Add toast.success/toast.error calls for: song create/update/delete, tag add/remove, playlist create/delete, song added to/removed from playlist, scan complete, all errors. Use sonner (already installed). Check every store action and every dialog submit handler.

features.name: Loading skeletons everywhere
features.description: Add shadcn Skeleton placeholders while data loads: SongTable (3-5 skeleton rows), Sidebar playlist list (skeleton items), PlaylistDetail (skeleton while loading), Filter results (loading text while filtering). Use the loading boolean from each Zustand store.

features.name: Keyboard shortcut: space to play/pause
features.description: In App.tsx, add a keydown listener for Space that calls playerStore.togglePlay() — but ONLY when no input/textarea is focused (check document.activeElement?.tagName !== 'INPUT' && document.activeElement?.tagName !== 'TEXTAREA').

features.name: Visual polish pass
features.description: Fix: volume slider right-edge clipping (add padding), player bar left/center/right spacing balance, consistent hover effects (transition-colors duration-150) on all interactive elements, currently-playing song highlighted with teal left border in table, tag editor styling improvements. Do NOT change the audio slider implementation (keep HTML range inputs).

features.name: Lock down CORS
features.description: In backend/app/main.py, change allow_origins from ['*'] back to ['http://localhost:5173', 'http://localhost:5174']. Test that the frontend still works.
